message.content:
PreOne™

Empowering Preschools.  
Enriching Childhoods.

The Operating System  
for Modern Preschools  

CONNECT • AUTOMATE • EMPOWER • GROW  

A unified intelligent platform to streamline operations,  
enhance communication and accelerate  
every child’s growth journey.  


[Image of a child with circular icons around: Happy Parents, Empowered Teachers, Efficient Admins, Smart Decisions, Confident Children]  


[Device screenshots showing:  
- Parent App (left): “Hello, Neha”, “Overall Growth: Excellent 8.7/10”, “Today’s Highlights”  
- Admin Dashboard (center): “Total Students 780”, “Total Teachers 68”, “Attendance 92%”, “Revenue This Month ₹11,25,000”, “Attendance Overview”, “Admissions Overview 82%”, “Recent Activities”, “AI Insights”  
- Teacher App (right): “Today’s Class Overview: 20, 2, 3”, “Today’s Activities”  
- Owner Dashboard (far right): “All Branches Overview: ₹49.8L, 96, 2,450”, “Revenue Trend”, “Branch Performance”]  


AI Powered  
Growth Engine  

Secure &  
Reliable  

Cloud Based  
& Scalable  

Data Driven  
Insights  

Mobile First  
Experience  


Designed & Developed By  

NueEra  
www.nueera.com  
hello@nueera.com  
+91 7066607424  

NueEra Technologies

Every Child is Unique.  
Every Moment is Precious.  

PreOne helps you capture, nurture  
and celebrate the beautiful journey  
of childhood.
